verses.text: Behold, all generations hence my blessedness will e’er proclaim. The Mighty One hath done great things for me, and holy is his name. © 2015 Lou Ann Shafer
For generations, fearing him, his mercy will on them abide. His mighty arm displays his strength; he scatters those who dwell in pride. © 2015 Lou Ann Shafer
He cast the mighty from their thrones, and lifted those of low estate. The hungry he hath filled with good; the rich he empty sent away. © 2015 Lou Ann Shafer
He helped his servant Israel, in mem’ry of his mercy sure, as told our father Abraham, and to his seed forevermore.
